tools.name: get_market_regime
tools.description: The top-down market read: is the tape risk-on, be-selective, or stand-down? Returns the regime verdict, mode and permission ladder (index → sector → name) for each book (S&P 500, Nasdaq-100, macro, BTC/ETH crypto). Check this before acting on any name-level signal.

tools.name: get_buy_list
tools.description: Today's ranked buy-list candidates per book across two lanes (risk-adjusted and swing), each with buy/entry/growth/hold scores, a leadership flag and an entry-window note — plus the regime mode saying whether the list is actionable at all.

tools.name: get_stock_read
tools.description: One stock's full Coil read: opportunity 0-100 + board percentile, entry quality and state (READY / SETUP / WAIT / CHASE / FALLING), hold strength and leadership flag, plus its book's regime. Any S&P 500, Nasdaq-100 or macro name. Unknown symbols return the valid-symbol directory.

tools.name: get_market_leaders
tools.description: Today's market leaders, ranked: the top 10 leadership names per book by opportunity score — names in confirmed uptrends carrying the market's strength, each with the full score read.

tools.name: get_sector_read
tools.description: One sector's drill-down: every member of the sector scored and ranked by opportunity, plus the sector's own ETF row. Accepts a sector name (e.g. 'Energy', 'Information Technology') or its ETF symbol (e.g. XLE, XLK). Unknown values return the sector directory.
